name: circle-chart
title: BTCircleChart
description: Pie / donut / donut-rounded chart molecule wrapping ApexCharts. Renders coloured sections with external badge labels showing the section letter and percentage. Three visual variants selectable via the `variant` prop.

files.content:
export type { BTCircleSection } from '../internal/chart.types';

export type BTCircleChartVariant = 'pie' | 'donut' | 'donutRounded';
